_codex_staging.notes: UnitedHealth Group transcript source research deposit for FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026. Official materials identified in prior handoff were prepared remarks or financial materials, not accepted full written transcripts.

research_scope: FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026 inclusive
source_policy_applied: Readable earnings-call transcript text is accepted; source classification is provenance, not a blocker. Third-party rows retain usage_caution.
